mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(file_code), 0) + 1 FROM attachments
INSERT INTO attachments ( file_code, user_code, uploaded_at, table_code ) VALUES ( #{fileCode}, #{userCode}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{tableCode} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(file_detail_code), 0) + 1 FROM attachments_detail
INSERT INTO attachments_detail ( file_detail_code, file_code, original_name, stored_name, path, mime_type, size_bytes, is_used ) VALUES ( #{fileDetailCode}, #{fileCode}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{path}, #{mimeType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{isUsed} )
mapper.select: SELECT d.file_detail_code, d.file_code, d.original_name, d.stored_name, d.path, d.mime_type, d.size_bytes, d.is_used, a.user_code, a.uploaded_at, a.table_code FROM attachments_detail d JOIN attachments a ON a.file_code = d.file_code WHERE d.file_code = #{fileCode} AND d.is_used = 1
